tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall address
    edit "UbuntuComputer"
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "Ubuntu-Restricted-Outbound"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING" "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
    move 101 before 100
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "UbuntuComputer"
new entry 'UbuntuComputer' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer) #         set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255 .255

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 0

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set name "Ubuntu-Restricted-Outbound"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set service "PING" "HTTP" "HTTPS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set nat enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 101 before 100
Command fail. Return code 1

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Ubuntu-Restricted-Outbound"
        set uuid ee271f36-2b58-51f1-af5f-d9921c916b9c
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING" "HTTP" "HTTPS"

next
end
